ddls:
CREATE TABLE "traffic_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each traffic event */,
  "db_id" INTEGER /* Database identifier for the event */,
  "place_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the place/crossroad */,
  "direction" INTEGER /* Direction of the vehicle (0: North, 1: South, etc.) */,
  "event_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the event */,
  "width" INTEGER /* Width of the vehicle in inches */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the vehicle in inches */,
  "projection_distance" REAL /* Distance from the camera projection point in feet */,
  "speed" REAL /* Speed of the vehicle in mph */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* File name of any associated data file */,
  "event_type_id" INTEGER /* Type of traffic event */,
  "vehicle_type_id" INTEGER /* Type of vehicle */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the event */,
  "road_conditions" TEXT /* Road conditions during the event */,
  "lane_number" INTEGER /* Lane number where the event occurred */,
  "is_incident" INTEGER /* Indicates if the event is an incident */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_traffic_events_vehicle_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_type_id") REFERENCES vehicle_types ("vehicle_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_traffic_events_place_id FOREIGN KEY ("place_id") REFERENCES places ("place_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_traffic_events_event_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_type_id") REFERENCES event_types ("event_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "places" (
  "place_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each place */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name or description of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate of the location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the location is situated */,
  "road_name" TEXT /* Name of the road */,
  "intersection" TEXT /* Name of the intersection */,
  "number_of_lanes" INTEGER /* Number of lanes at the location */,
  "traffic_signal_type" TEXT /* Type of traffic signal */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("place_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., traffic analyst, city planner, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_types" (
  "event_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event type */,
  "event_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the event type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_types" (
  "vehicle_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle type */,
  "vehicle_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the vehicle type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the vehicle type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "speed_limit_zones" (
  "zone_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each speed limit zone */,
  "place_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the place for the speed limit */,
  "speed_limit" INTEGER /* Speed limit in mph */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the speed limit became effective */,
  "time_of_day" TEXT /* Time of day the speed limit is effective */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the speed limit is no longer effective */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("zone_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_speed_limit_zones_place_id FOREIGN KEY ("place_id") REFERENCES places ("place_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "accident_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each accident report */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated traffic event */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the accident */,
  "report_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the report creation */,
  "severity" INTEGER /* Severity of the accident */,
  "injuries" INTEGER /* Number of injuries */,
  "fatalities" INTEGER /* Number of fatalities */,
  "damage_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of any property damage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_accident_reports_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES traffic_events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "camera_locations" (
  "camera_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each camera */,
  "place_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the monitoring place */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the camera was installed */,
  "camera_type" TEXT /* Type of camera used for monitoring */,
  "camera_orientation" TEXT /* Orientation of the camera */,
  "camera_resolution" TEXT /* Resolution of the camera */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("camera_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_camera_locations_place_id FOREIGN KEY ("place_id") REFERENCES places ("place_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated traffic event */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path of the data file */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date when the file was uploaded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES traffic_events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user accessing the data */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the accessed traffic event */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the data was accessed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES traffic_events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistics entry */,
  "place_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the place for statistics */,
  "event_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of event for statistics */,
  "total_events" INTEGER /* Total number of events in the period */,
  "time_period" TEXT /* Time period for the statistics */,
  "average_speed" REAL /* Average speed of vehicles during the period */,
  "peak_hours" TEXT /* Peak hours of traffic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_statistics_event_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_type_id") REFERENCES event_types ("event_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_statistics_place_id FOREIGN KEY ("place_id") REFERENCES places ("place_id")
)
